tokens.name: --font-system
tokens.value:
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro", "SF Pro Text",
    "SF Pro Display", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

tokens.name: --font-rounded
tokens.value:
ui-rounded, "SF Pro Rounded", "SF Compact Rounded",
    var(--font-system)

tokens.name: --font-mono
tokens.value:
ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Cascadia Mono",
    "Roboto Mono", monospace
